meta.name: template-b-nested-orchestration
meta.description: TEMPLATE (B — nested orchestration): discover a list of items, then run a sub-thread per item. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: Per-item work over a list whose size is unknown until an agent discovers it

args.scope: string (required) — <where to discover items, e.g. a directory or board>

steps.does: <discover: e.g. list every item in {scope} that needs work>
<per-item work: e.g. apply the fix to {item}>
<per-item check: e.g. verify the fix to {item} using {itemResults}>

end.review: <e.g. one verdict per discovered item; no item skipped silently>
